description: This video discusses the storage of Solana NFTs on-chain, explaining the distinction between NFT tokens and their associated assets. It highlights the importance of on-chain storage, critiques the current state of NFTs, and references historical trends in the NFT market.
topic_summary: The video provides an overview of how Solana NFTs can be stored on-chain, addressing misconceptions about NFTs being entirely on-chain and discussing the implications of off-chain storage. It also contrasts the evolution of NFTs from unlimited collectibles to limited editions and their perceived value in the digital art market [t=1:20].
